_readme: Edit this file and push to git. status.stluker.com rebuilds in ~30s. Valid status values: live | prog | plan | risk. Risk factors: orphaned | noRepo | noCICD | depPause | depQuota | wiring | undeployed
_session_notes: Session: fire-api cost fix, supabase-keepalive, reunion Resend, pokelab/ironrails CI/CD, stl-sports/stl-music CI/CD via GitHub Actions, status board data.json split

services.title: stluker.com / www
services.summary: Main ecosystem site and front door.

services.title: sports.stluker.com
services.summary: STL/7 — rolling 7-day St. Louis sports slate. CI/CD live via GitHub Actions → wrangler deploy on push to main.

services.title: music.stluker.com
services.summary: STL/Music — 7-day concerts, comedy & theater slate. CI/CD live via GitHub Actions. Cron 0 11 * * 2 registered. Weekly KV pulse still manual.

services.title: memory.stluker.com
services.summary: Knowledge tool. Live on Pages; Supabase persistence not yet wired. Keepalive cron protecting from pause.

services.title: fire.stluker.com
services.summary: Fire intel dashboard — the FIRE / retirement front end. Git-connected CI/CD via Cloudflare Pages.

services.title: fire-api.stluker.com
services.summary: Backend API powering the fire intel dashboard. Routed through AI Gateway, max_uses:2 on web_search, manual refresh rate-limited.

services.title: trip.stluker.com
services.summary: Trip Companion planner. Open: export photos from the app.

services.title: reunion.stluker.com
services.summary: Reunion / event RSVP. Resend confirmation emails live — branded email with full event details sent on every submission.

services.title: family.stluker.com
services.summary: Family hub. Repo familyplate → worker family. Supabase auth wiring needs confirming. Keepalive cron protecting from pause.

services.title: ptodashboard.stluker.com
services.summary: PTO dashboard — CNAME onto the same barrettspto worker.

services.title: pokelab.stluker.com
services.summary: Pokémon lab tool. Source recovered, backed up to GitHub. CI/CD connected via Cloudflare Workers git integration.

services.title: trains.stluker.com
services.summary: ironrails transit tracker. Source recovered, backed up to GitHub. CI/CD connected via Cloudflare Workers git integration.

services.title: surf.stluker.com
services.summary: Worker deleted Jun 17. DNS record cleaned up. Parked — no further action needed.

services.title: surfcam.stluker.com
services.summary: surfflow-scoring deleted Jun 17 — freed YouTube quota and cron slot. Pages site may remain.

services.title: geo.stluker.com
services.summary: Geo/map tool. Repo exists, deployment deferred.

services.title: media.stluker.com
services.summary: Media gallery — Cloudinary + R2. Concept only, no app yet.

backlog.txt: Automate weekly music KV pulse — scraper/cron replacing manual push to MUSIC_KV
Export photos from the Trip Companion app
Remove orphaned surf.stluker.com DNS record — cleaned up
Delete redundant fire-intel-keepalive worker — freed cron slot
Add stl-music cron trigger 0 11 * * 2 in CF dashboard — live
Cloudflare cron → ping Supabase every 5 days to prevent free-tier pause
Wire Resend into the reunion worker — branded confirmation email with event details on every RSVP
Recover & back up orphaned worker source to GitHub + connect CI/CD
Connect stl-sports to GitHub (pdluker/stl-sports) + GitHub Actions CI/CD — push to main = auto-deploy
Connect stl-music to GitHub (pdluker/stl-music) + GitHub Actions CI/CD — push to main = auto-deploy
Route through AI Gateway, cap web_search max_uses:2, add 30-min refresh rate limit
Split status board into index.html + data.json — update cards by editing JSON and pushing to git
Cross-link nav across stluker, family, sports & music
DNS delegated to Cloudflare · Resend verified · DMARC added
